name: Microsoft/ms-export-anonymized
description: Anonymized $export conformance tests: kick-off with valid anonymization params (202 + Content-Location) at system/Patient/Group scope, and synchronous 400s for missing/conflicting anonymization params. Scenarios requiring job completion and redacted-blob content verification are not covered (from AnonymizedExportTests, AnonymizedExportUsingAcrTests). The _anonymizationConfig* params are an Azure Health Data Services extension of $export, not base HL7 Bulk Data — hence the Microsoft category. Gated on the target advertising the system-level $export operation.

variable.name: systemAnonExportLocation
variable.description: Content-Location returned by the system-level anonymized export kickoff

variable.name: patientAnonExportLocation
variable.description: Content-Location returned by the Patient/$export anonymized export kickoff

variable.name: groupAnonExportLocation
variable.description: Content-Location returned by the Group/123456/$export anonymized export kickoff

test.name: anonymized system-level export kick-off returns 202 Accepted with Content-Location
test.description: System-level anonymized $export kick-off with a valid config/container/etag must return 202 Accepted plus Content-Location; actual redaction of exported data is not verified. Requires the AnonymizedExport feature to be enabled on the target server. (from AnonymizedExportTests)

assert.description: Anonymized system-level export kick-off must return 202 Accepted
Content-Location header must be present and non-empty

operation.description: Best-effort cancel so the job doesn't actually run to completion

test.name: anonymized Patient-level export kick-off returns 202 Accepted with Content-Location
test.description: Patient-level anonymized $export kick-off must return 202 Accepted plus Content-Location; redaction of exported data is not verified. (from AnonymizedExportTests)

assert.description: Anonymized Patient-level export kick-off must return 202 Accepted
Content-Location header must be present and non-empty

operation.description: Best-effort cancel so the job doesn't actually run to completion

test.name: anonymized Group-level export kick-off returns 202 Accepted with Content-Location
test.description: Group-level anonymized $export kick-off must return 202 Accepted plus Content-Location; the group id is a placeholder and redaction/member-count verification is not covered. (from AnonymizedExportTests)

assert.description: Anonymized Group-level export kick-off must return 202 Accepted
Content-Location header must be present and non-empty

operation.description: Best-effort cancel so the job doesn't actually run to completion

test.name: anonymized export without a _container returns 400 Bad Request
test.description: An anonymized export request with _anonymizationConfig but no _container must return 400. (from AnonymizedExportTests)

assert.description: Missing _container with an anonymization config present must return 400 Bad Request

test.name: anonymized export without an _anonymizationConfig location returns 400 Bad Request
test.description: An anonymized export request with an _anonymizationConfigEtag but no _anonymizationConfig location must return 400. (from AnonymizedExportTests validation path)

assert.description: Missing _anonymizationConfig with an etag present must return 400 Bad Request

test.name: anonymized export with both an ACR collection reference and an etag returns 400 Bad Request
test.description: Supplying both _anonymizationConfigCollectionReference (ACR-based config) and _anonymizationConfigEtag (blob-based config) must return 400, as they are mutually exclusive ways to pin a config version. (from AnonymizedExportUsingAcrTests validation path)

assert.description: Supplying both an ACR collection reference and an etag must return 400 Bad Request
